character.bio: This self-styled Chinatown peacekeeper aspires to the example set by Yun and Yang, the Twin Dragons. An expert dancer, Jamie places justice and friendship above all else, defending his town with martial skill.

jamie_standing_medium_kick_m.note: 1 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

jamie_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Can be canceled until the 1st active frameForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Produces a crumple stun on Punish CounterForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

jamie_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionCan be canceled until the 2nd active frame

jamie_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard KnockdownForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent* 1 frames of recovery added when the attack is blocked*Second attack is considered a high attack only when the first attack is blocked

jamie_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie_jumping_heavy_kick.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie_tensei_kick.note: Can only be canceled into a jump if the attack hits

jamie_phantom_sway_3.note: Adds 1 Drink level at frame 56Recovers 2500 Drive Gauge when Drink level is 3 or underIf Drink Level is at 4, recovers 10,000 Drive Gauge

jamie_bitter_strikes_1.note: Available at Drink Level 1 or higher

jamie_bitter_strikes_2.note: Available at Drink Level 1 or higher

jamie_bitter_strikes_3.note: Available at Drink Level 1 or higher* 2 frames of recovery added when the attack is blocked

jamie_full_moon_kick_2.note: Available at Drink Level 2 and higher

jamie_full_moon_kick_3.note: Available at Drink Level 2 and higherAdds 1 Drink level at frame 54Recovers 5000 Drive Gauge when Drink level is 3 or underIf Drink Level is at 4, recovers 10,000 Drive Gauge

jamie_intoxicated_assault_1.note: Available at Drink Level 3 or higher

jamie_ransui_haze_2.note: Available at Drink Level 4Transitions even when the attack missesDuring the attack, press an attack button with specific timing to change the transition attackFrames 6-25: Ransui Haze 1Frames 31-55: Ransui Haze 2Frames 63-80: Ransui Haze 3

jamie_ransui_haze_3rd_hit_longest_possib.displayName: Ransui Haze(3rd hit / longest possible delay)
jamie_ransui_haze_3rd_hit_longest_possib.note: Available at Drink Level 4Recovers 10,000 Drive Gauge

jamie_the_devil_inside.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
jamie_the_devil_inside.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) ↓↓ + P
jamie_the_devil_inside.note: Adds a Drink level on frame 49If Drink level is already at 4, recovers 5,000 Drive GaugeHolding the button continues the action, and will only add to the Drink level for as long as the button is heldWhen the button is held for only one level, the entire move is 97 framesDamage increases in line with Drink level, and new moves are availableDamage scaling per Drin kLevelDrink Level 0: 90%Drink Level 1: 95%Drink Level 2: 100%Drink Level 3: 105%Drink Level 4: 110%* During The Devil's Song, damage is scaled to 105%

jamie_l_freeflow_strikes_2_l.note: Can transition to following attacks even if this attack misses

jamie_m_freeflow_strikes_2_m.note: Can transition to following attacks even if this attack misses

jamie_l_freeflow_kicks_3_l.note: Adds one Drink level on frame 55Recovers 5000 Drive Gauge when Drink level is 3 or underRecovers the Drive Gauge by 10,000 if the player is already at Drink level 4

jamie_m_freeflow_kicks_3_m.note: Adds one Drink level on frame 59Recovers 5000 Drive Gauge when Drink level is 3 or underRecovers the Drive Gauge by 10,000 if the player is already at Drink level 4

jamie_od_swagger_step.note: Produces a wall splat on Punish Counter

jamie_l_arrow_kick_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 12Will only transition to the 2nd hit and after when the first attack hits

jamie_m_arrow_kick_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14Will only transition to the 2nd hit and after when the first attack hits

jamie_h_arrow_kick_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 16Will only transition to the 2nd hit and after when the first attack hits

jamie_od_arrow_kick.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 10 - 12The second hit and subsequent attacks only come out if the first attack hits

jamie_l_bakkai.note: Available at Drink Level 2 or higherInvincible to projectiles from frames 3 - 24The last hit can be canceled into SA3/Critical Art

jamie_m_bakkai.note: Available at Drink Level 2 or higherInvincible to projectiles from frames 4 - 26The last hit can be canceled into SA3/Critical Art

jamie_h_bakkai.note: Available at Drink Level 2 or higherInvincible to projectiles from frames 5 - 33The last hit can be canceled into SA3/Critical Art

jamie_od_bakkai.note: Invincible to projectiles from frames 3 - 28Only the 7th hit can be canceled into SA3/Critical Art

jamie_tenshin.input: (Drink level 3 or higher) (When near opponent) →↘↓↙← + K
jamie_tenshin.note: Available at Drink Level 3 or higher* Combo scaling starts from the 3rd hit

jamie_od_tenshin.input: (Drink level 3 or higher) (When near opponent) →↘↓↙← + K
jamie_od_tenshin.note: Available at Drink Level 3 or higherProduces a crumple stun on hit

jamie_sa1_breakin.note: Invincible to throws and strikes from frames 1 - 12Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* While the attack is executed, continue to hold Down to change the attack's properties and raise your Drink level by 1

jamie_sa2_the_devil_s_song.note: Temporarily raises Drink level to 4Note: Damage is increased to 105%Timer is active for 900 framesIf this move is performed when the player is already at Drink level 4, the player instead recovers 30,000 to the Drive Gauge

jamie_sa3_getsuga_saiho.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
jamie_sa3_getsuga_saiho.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
jamie_sa3_getsuga_saiho.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 12Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Produces a hard knockdown

jamie_ca_getsuga_saiho.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
jamie_ca_getsuga_saiho.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
jamie_ca_getsuga_saiho.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 12Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Forces a hard knockdown

jamie_back_shaver.context: (When near opponent) (Hold the button to change effect)
jamie_back_shaver.input: (When near opponent) (Hold the button to change effect) /6LP + LK
jamie_back_shaver.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown*Hold down the button during the technique to change its properties and raise drink level by 1

jamie_wheel_punch.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

jamie_drive_impact_vainglory_strike.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

jamie_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
jamie_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
jamie_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

jamie_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

jamie_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
jamie_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
jamie_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

jamie_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

jamie_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

jamie_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

jamie_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
jamie_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
jamie_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
